DAILY · MANUAL IN MVP
Start with one decision-ready brief

Convert runtime pressure and growth priorities into one ranked move for today.

T
G
H
−
TRIGGER

First work session of the day or after a major context switch.

PROOF OF DONE

A one-page brief with source timestamps, one owner, one move, and one acceptance check.

APPROVAL BOUNDARY

Required only if the selected move sends, publishes, spends, deletes, or changes an external system.

SUCCESS MEASURE

Dad can approve, reject, or redirect the move in under two minutes.

CONNECTED SOURCES
Latest privacy-redacted Token Pulse snapshot
Current Growth Command experiment and source ledger
OPERATING STEPS
Check data freshness before using any metric.
Separate observed facts from assumptions.
Rank one move by impact, confidence, and reversibility.
Name the proof that will close the loop.
EXACT OPERATOR PROMPT
Manual execution · read-only MVP
Copy prompt

Build today’s operator brief from the latest Token Pulse and Growth Command evidence. Separate observed facts, source claims, inference, and unknowns. Recommend exactly one highest-leverage reversible move. Include source freshness, owner, approval gate, and the real artifact or system check that proves completion. Do not send, publish, spend, delete, or change an external system w
